feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BDC / Batch Input for Sales Orders Custom Fields Tab
entry.content:
Hi,

We are on S/4HANA 2023 FPS02.

We created custom fields using Custom Fields Fiori App for Business context "Sales:Sales Document" ( Sales Order Header). We enabled User Interfaces for SAP GUI, Data SOurce SD_SALESDOC_GUI

We can see the custom fields in a new tab "Custom Fields" next to "Additional Data B".

We are also using IDOCs to create Sales Orders. Problem is that IDOCs use BDC / Batch Input to create Sales Orders. IDOC function module is IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS and all fields on the "Custom Fields" tab have "GS_SAP_GUI_UI_FIELDS-TEXT_FIELD_VALUE" as Dynpro Field for Program "SAPMV45A", Screen Number "4002"

Question is, if anyone was able to successfully process BDC / Batch Input for the Custom fields displayed on the "Custom Fields" tab?

If not able to use it, what was the alternate used?

Thank you.

entry.title: i_journalentry_tp dump FI_WT_AR_GET_WTAK
entry.content:
Hi team

I have this dump when i use i_journalentry_tp to post a Fi document

 

in my case y only create a demo code in a SE38 report using I_JOURNALENTRYTP 

    DATA lt_new TYPE TABLE FOR ACTION IMPORT i_journalentrytp~Post.

    INSERT VALUE #(
        %cid   = to_upper( cl_uuid_factory=>create_system_uuid( )->create_uuid_x16( ) )
        %param = VALUE #(
            companycode            = '1000'
            createdbyuser          = sy-uname
            accountingdocumenttype = 'SA'
            documentdate           = '20250108'
            postingdate            = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( )
            DocumentReferenceID    = |RAP: { sy-uname }|
            _glitems               = VALUE #(
*                ( glaccountlineitem = '1' glaccount = '0011002080' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '-100.55' currency = 'EUR' ) ) )
                ( glaccountlineitem = '1' glaccount = '824004' CostCenter = '12008'  _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '-10.55' currency = 'ARS' ) ) )
*                ( glaccountlineitem = '2' glaccount = '0070200000' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '100.55' currency = 'EUR' ) ) ) ) ) )
                ( glaccountlineitem = '2' glaccount = '130011' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '10.55' currency = 'ARS' ) ) ) ) ) )
           INTO TABLE lt_new.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_journalentrytp
           ENTITY journalentry
           EXECUTE post FROM lt_new
           FAILED DATA(ls_failed_deep)
           REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_deep).


but I have a dump. My system is S/4HANA private edition 2023


I debug and jump over the function in update task, because the table parameter LT_WTAK was empty in may case 

and then it works  

but I don't understand why the I_journalentry_tp call this function module as FB01 do if behaviour can't call functions in update task 


Could someone solve this dump?

Best regards!

entry.title: Unable to Create Event Consumption Model in On-premise system.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm trying to create an event consumption model by following the steps from the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-event-processing-s4h-onpremise..html

and getting the below error. Could you please help me on resolving this error?

Regards,

Ramesh

entry.title: I am having trouble accessing my study material in assigned Learning Journey via imbedded links.
entry.content: Learning Journey imbedded links are sending me on an endless loupe and I am unable to find all of the assigned SAP Learning material.  Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - OnPremise DRP
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a customer who requires their DRP to be built on on-premise servers (not on cloud).

In S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Is it allowed for customers to build an on-premise DRP? 

Thanks in advanced.

Best regards

entry.title: Sandbox and Development Temp outside RISE landscape for S/4HANA version upgrade
entry.content:
Hi,

We have existing client who is already on RISE S/4HANA PCE and planning to upgrade to S/4HANA 2023.

The plan is to have Sandbox upgrade first and also setup temporary development to support Production system while doing upgrade project.

For these 2 temp servers required, client is asking if possible to host temp servers outside RISE system landscape ie on any of hyperscaler? If yes, for Sandbox upgrade and DEV temp setup is customer/SI responsibility and how about the connection into RISE for DEV temp and other impact to RISE we need to take into consideration?

Thanks.

entry.title: Query about accruals in the rebate process 1B6 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing the 1B6 rebate process in #SAP S/4HANA, and the client has a specific requirement regarding the accruals for the condition contract.

The objective is for the corresponding accruals to be reflected individually in the conditions of each sales document or invoice that contributes to the business volume of the condition contract (these could be statistical if it is only possible to settle the accruals through Settlement Management). This would provide greater predictability and clarity for the client when granting other types of discounts.

We are currently investigating whether this can be achieved using standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA or if a custom development would be required.

Has anyone worked on a similar scenario or has experience with this type of configuration? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Matías

entry.title: Hybrid LOB: INSERT/UPSERT Performance
entry.content:
Dear HANA Experts,

i am considering converting some VARBINARY Columns to Hybrid LOB and i am curious on the performance impact for WRITE operations. For READ it is clear to me that all LOB Data bigger some threshold (>1KB in default) is stored on Disk. So there is some I/O overhead for this.

But for the WRITE Performance, i am not sure: is there some additionally WRITE I/O for INSERT/UPSERT necessary, besides the usual sync. commit on LOG disk? is for Hybrid LOB delta store in use? 

My concern originates from SAP note 2000002, point 10: "Increased runtime of INSERT operation on table with hybrid LOB field" -> "INSERTs in hybrid LOBs have to perform disk I/O if the configured memory threshold is exceeded and the data is stored in a disk LOB."

I hope some Experts here in the HANA community can help me with this.

Thank you very much

BR Dominik

entry.title: Hybrid landscape with RISE
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a customer with many ERP systems across the globe. He has currently more than 5 ECC systems that are  technically disparate and in different countries . He would like to go to S/4HANA with a greenfield approach and go to RISE with SAP . But for security reasons he can not put all his systems in the cloud and one system should remain on premises.

  He would like to keep the development and quality environment in RISE and most of pre-production and production in RISE, but one pre-production and one production would go on-premises (as described in the image). Do you know if it's possible to have an hybrid landscape, with most of the systems in RISE in different countries and some systems on-premises ? How the basis part (TOs, refreshes, upgrades...) is managed by SAP in such cases ?

entry.title: A list with irreversible customizing in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dears,

Can you pls help me to find a list with irreversible customizing in S/4HANA?

I am much interested in MM, but would like to have a list of all.

Do you know if have such info provided by SAP?

BR,

Marina

entry.title: My inbox custom tile showing error
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I have been attempting to create a custom tile for "My Inbox" app in order to expand the number of items shown on the list.

Referring to the below Help portal and SAP note, I added a parameter "ListSize" with a value "500" to the target mapping for my inbox but I get the configuration error when trying to open the My Inbox tile.

Could you advise me on how this can be properly done?

(https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/865dddc8717e408f91209697497e4a55.html?locale=en-US)

(SNOTE 2995823)

The new parameter added.

Thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Use of Additional Schemas for Integration in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In our current setup with SAP S/4HANA and SAP CAR databases, we use additional schemas beyond the standard application schema, primarily for integration purposes.

I would like to know:

  1. From a technical perspective, is it feasible to use additional schemas in a private cloud environment (e.g., SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud under RISE)?
  2. Are there any specific licensing requirements or considerations for using such schemas in this context?

I would greatly appreciate your insights or experiences regarding these points.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: SAP Vendors with same VAT number (UK VAT group)
entry.content:
Hello team,

Please see below a query from one of my customers. Any recommendation/feedback is much appreciated!

Apparently, when a group of companies registers as a VAT Group, the UK tax office assigns them a VAT number, so the members of that VAT group have the same VAT number (in our case, they are 8-9 vendors).

Therefore, there are 8-9 vendors that have the same VAT number, but they are different vendors (each engaged in a particular activity).

As SAP by default handles duplicity of VAT number when generating the vendors, it would give us an error when creating these vendors. Is there any UK specific functionality that covers this? or what would be the standard SAP solution?

Kind regards,

Blanca

entry.title: Question about PPF
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'm writing a PCE Customer Onboarding Form (COF).

The customer is trying to use the SAP PCE Private IPv4 Subnet (/22) as 100.9.0.0/22 and I want to know if it's OK to use it in the PCE Primary Data Cennter IP range.

For your information, this IP does not overlap with the customer's IP.

Regards,

YE

entry.title: Azure VPN questionnaire for COF
entry.content:
Hi CAA,

I am in Midst COF and where can i find the Azure VPN questionnaire ?

I cannot find in the Assets for Partners in a Cloud Architect Role or in the forums.

Br/AS

entry.title: Employee master upload issues through LSMW
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have an issue while uploading Employee master through LSMW tool in SAP S/4HANA.  

We could not progress in uploading from infotype 0009 (Bank Details), 588 (Provident Fund, Income Tax Regime), 587 (ESI), 185 (Personnel ID - Aadhaar, PAN, UAN, Gratuity number).

Could you please advise on how to upload Employee master successfully in SAP S/4HANA using LSMW tool. This requirement is for India specific.

Also, please advise any alternate options available for uploading Employee master like BAPI. 

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: SAP RAP: Is it possible to add empty row to table on object page?
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anybody know if it's possible to add an empty row or row with default values on object page in SAP RAP?
I want to achieve something like this: I have root entity and this root entity has composition of roles. Now on the object page of the root entity want to add a role.
So I do not want to create one by one in another window. But want to do it only in table.
Add empty row -> fill it out -> save.

 

Is it possible somehow in sap rap? Or maybe I should add something in SAP Fiori elements?
I am attaching screenshot showing what it should look like.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: cor6n/co11n bug buttons overlay material description
entry.content:
Hi to all!

I have noticed that in transactions co11n/cor6n for confirmations, in the Goods movements screen, the Material Description field is overlaid with several button, including the 'selection' and 'delete' buttons. This happens irrespectively of the font I choose (Belize, blue crystal or quartz). I am currently using sap GUI 770 but colleagues with sap GUI 800 face the same issue. I have not managed to find a note on this bug or an explanation on the issue. 

Best regards

P.s.: Please find below a screenshot of the issue

entry.title: When is LIKP-TCODE populated with VL10X
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would need to know when the field LIKP-TCODE for Outbound Deliveries (e.g. LF) is populated with "VL10X" instead of "VL01N".

I made some tests and seems to be related to a massive delivery creation, when multiple sales orders are included in the same delivery (using for instance t.code VL10C): is my understanding correct?

Do you know which Fiori APP are used to store value VL10X in LIKP-TCODE?

Thank you in advance,

Sonia.

entry.title: Application job debug SAP_FIN_GL_FOR_IMP_RUN
entry.content:
Hello,

We are facing the issue of debugging application job SAP_FIN_GL_FOR_IMP_RUN coming from sap t-code FINS_IMPAIRMENT. We need to adjust the logic for a CLS_LINE_ITEM_STATUS_DETAIL field check. 

Can I ask If someone has any hint on how to reach the place where those statuses are fetched?

Many thanks for any hint.

T
